session.name: MPI-256 Artistic tier — Foundations batch + Phase 2 (run-path plumbing) shipped; Phase 3 (App Library overlay) is next

goal.original: Implement MPI-256: Artistic tier — App Library + Apps (Higgsfield-style outcome apps). Dev-gated App Library overlay + App overlays that run outcome workflows through the existing generation queue and land as gallery cards. Investigation + design + large plan already done; execute the plan SEQUENTIALLY on Opus (user explicitly rejected Haiku sub-agents — this plan is trap-dense and must not fail).
goal.summary: Foundations batch (4/4) + Phase 2 run-path plumbing (4/4) COMPLETE and all live-verified on real Electron. The whole run seam is proven: an app-style universal gen (model:{id:null}) runs SDXL i2i and lands as a normal gallery card, with appId+appInputs persisted to the .meta sidecar (survives restart). Next is Phase 3: the MpiAppLibrary overlay UI (the first large phase — a new Organism).

completed: Foundations: MpiOverlay 'main-area' mount mode (3 traps + fixed a pre-existing z-index bug: inline z was set inside _doShow which runs during Overlays.request() BEFORE _zIndex is assigned; moved z-apply + --app-overlay-z publish to el.show() post-request)
Foundations: queue slide-over z above app overlay (z-index: calc(var(--app-overlay-z,90)+10) on .mpi-slide-over--queue in Compounds/MpiSlideOver.css)
Foundations: apps registry — single self-contained js/data/appsRegistry.js (APPS empty, listApps/getAppById/appAvailability), read-only over s_installedModelIds, NO install-sync
Foundations: state.s_appInputs key (session-only, not persisted, top-level replace) + component-state.md row (user-approved)

Phase 2: appImageRegen universal op registered 4 files (commandRegistry.js [in js/data/ NOT js/core/], universal_workflows.js [js/data/modelConstants/], operationRegistry.js, operation_registry.json [hand-superset, all 6 pre-existing universal flags preserved]) + comfy_workflows/App_sdxl_regen.json (from sdxl-nsfw graph, Input_Is_i2i baked true) + inject-params-titles.test.cjs case (3/3 green). Seam LIVE-verified: gen lands as gallery card.
Phase 2: submitAppGeneration(app,inputs) in js/services/appService.js — model pre-flight guard + config builder (model:{id:null}, no getNextGeneration), guard live-verified
Phase 2: run-clean VERIFIED no-change-needed (commandExecutor.js:680 gates LoRA injection on truthy modelId; app gens pass null → block unreachable)
Phase 2: sidecar appId+appInputs 4-site plumb + parity sites, LIVE-verified on disk after app restart (appId:'testApp', appInputs full snapshot persisted)
pending: Phase 3: MpiAppLibrary component (Compound/Organism, clones MpiModelManager skeleton) — body-mode MpiOverlay, card grid + availability badges, inline detail slide-over (info + required-models install state + Open/Install button). Register CSS in preloadStyles.js + props in types.js. USER-UX verify.
Phase 3: entry points + shell wiring — apps:open handler in shell.js (mirror models:open), dev-gated Gallery header button + Landing action, both APP_CONFIG.dev_mode-gated. USER-UX verify.
Phase 4: MpiBaseApp organism (composition not inheritance) + first app end-to-end + handoff. USER-UX verify (THE loop).
Phase 5: reuse routing — appId branch at TOP of _applyPromptReuse in both blocks (Gallery ~:1090, History ~:948 — search by name, line drift). USER-UX verify.
Phase 6: docs/apps.md + rule-file updates (ASK USER FIRST — Documentation Drift rule)

next_action.description: Start Phase 3: build the MpiAppLibrary component. Read plan.md Phase 3 first (it has the full spec + traps), and research/A-model-library-clone.md (the MpiModelManager clone target). Clone the Model Library overlay skeleton: body-mode MpiOverlay, card grid with availability badges from appAvailability(), inline detail slide-over with required-models install state + Open/Install footer button. Honor: never full-re-render on hot download:* events (use _patchTile-style updates), canOpen = (page===PAGE_GALLERY). Register CSS in preloadStyles.js + props in types.js. Verify USER-UX (npm start / real Electron). Continue sequential-on-Opus — do NOT dispatch Haiku sub-agents (user requirement).

key_decisions: Execution is SEQUENTIAL on Opus, not parallel Haiku sub-agents — user requirement (plan is trap-dense, must not fail). This overrides the plan's 'Foundations suitable for mpi-execute-parallel' note.

First app = SDXL i2i regen. User picked sdxl-realistic but it's NOT installed; re-pointed to sdxl-nsfw (installed, identical graph t2i_sdxl_nsfw.json). App descriptor's requiredModels will be ['sdxl-nsfw'] for now.

Apps declare requiredModels (MODEL ids), NEVER deps — zero dep duplication. appAvailability checks requiredModels ⊆ s_installedModelIds; Install button drives the model's own dep set. (User explicitly confirmed this design.)
appsRegistry = single self-contained file (not the appConstants/ two-file split) — app count is tiny.
Run-clean is by construction: commandExecutor.js:680 gates all LoRA/upscale injection on `if (payload.modelId)`; app gens pass model:{id:null} so it's unreachable. No explicit skip needed.
constraints: Routes do NOT hot-reload (user owns :3000). Backend route edits (routes/projects.js) only take effect after an app restart — factor this into any route-touching verify.

Browser-dev (127.0.0.1:3000 in a browser) does NOT run real generations — generation path needs real Electron. Verify gens by asking the user to run a console snippet in the Electron app, then read results/sidecars off disk.

The ComfyUI currently answering on :8188 is the user's G:/comfyui (0.27, same models + extras), NOT the app's bundled engine. Harmless for app-layer seam tests (engine-agnostic); explains 'port 8188 in use' log noise.

MpiOverlay z-index fix: inline z + --app-overlay-z are now set in el.show() AFTER Overlays.request() returns (not in _doShow, which runs during request before _zIndex exists). Any further overlay z work must respect this ordering.
operation_registry.json is a hand-maintained superset — never regenerate from operationRegistry.js (would strip the 6 `universal` flags).
Sidecar item shape now carries appId+appInputs everywhere (factories, routes, reconciler). Pre-fix sidecars lack the field → reader defaults null on reload, no crash.

resume_prompt: You are resuming MPI-256 (Artistic tier — App Library + Apps) on branch 1.2.0. Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/9c6d9123-adc1-413e-a721-5ca6b73856a9.json and use mpi-continue. Foundations batch + Phase 2 (run-path plumbing) are COMPLETE and live-verified on real Electron — the full seam works (an app universal gen with model:{id:null} runs SDXL i2i, lands as a gallery card, and persists appId+appInputs to the .meta sidecar). NOTHING IS COMMITTED yet (branch 1.2.0, commit at session end by explicit pathspec). CRITICAL: execute SEQUENTIALLY on Opus, do NOT dispatch Haiku sub-agents — the user requires this because the plan is trap-dense and must not fail. The next action is Phase 3: build the MpiAppLibrary overlay component (clone the MpiModelManager skeleton — see research/A-model-library-clone.md and plan.md Phase 3). First app is SDXL i2i regen re-pointed to sdxl-nsfw (sdxl-realistic isn't installed). Key gotchas: routes don't hot-reload (route edits need an app restart); browser-dev can't run real gens (verify via Electron console snippets); the running :8188 engine is the user's G:/comfyui not the bundled one (harmless); never full-re-render on hot download:* events. Read plan.md and the research/ files before touching code.
